gig_title: I will build an AI support bot for your online store
handles: order status, returns, sizing, shipping, product Q&A

deploy_spec.escalation: auto handoff to human on low confidence
deploy_spec.note: Self-hosted stack; no per-seat SaaS fees.

delivery_steps: 1. Collect KB source (product catalog + FAQ + returns policy)
2. Train bot on Hermes/OpenClaw + build intents
3. Deploy on Chatwoot across: website widget + WhatsApp + Instagram DM
